title: DebugPort
text: DebugPort Specify a port number that can be used by MSAA-based tools to connect to the widget for testing purposes. DebugPort = PortNumber Value Description PortNumber Port number that the test tool is using and which is not in use by other applications. Some tools use port 8081 as their default. Note: The DebugPort property is ignored or disabled in case a component is compiled with /nodebug . Usage Dynamic? No Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: Access Setting the Property To set this, specify it in the HTML widget definition in the initialization file. For example: Html=uhtml(debugport=8081) CAUTION: Set this property only during development and testing. For security purposes, do not set it in production applications. Applies To uhtml (HTML Widget) Related Links Accessibility Uniface exposes the UI of generated Windows desktop applications to screen readers and automation tools for a number of widgets. By exposing the underlying infrastructure, screen readers and automated testing tools can target supported UI elements, and retrieve information regarding their name, value, and status. For these purposes, a mixture of two different technologies has been used - UI Automation and MSAA (Microsoft Active Accessibility). Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
